3319430.name: Moonshadows Soundtrack
3319430.description: Created by Sight Telma Club, the Moonshadows Soundtrack includes all ambient tracks featured in overworld locations of the Eveshame forest, including the credits track and a bonus track! Embark on a synthwave journey through a surreal and fantastically dark forest that sounds anything but natural as Harlow and friends plunge deeper and deeper into its mysterious depths. This over 35-minute soundtrack is sure to intrigue and delight all those who dare to pass under the Moonshadow.
